body:
## Problem

`packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides.js` contains 2 fully-built, content-rich guide entries:

1. `best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal` — 1,850 words, 7 pedals reviewed, featuring George Kollias / Dave Lombardo / Gene Hoglan
2. `best-snare-drums-for-thrash-metal` — full content, snare recommendations by genre

These are **commercial-intent pages** with high conversion potential. However:
- **NOT imported in `App.js`** — no route exists; visiting `/guides/best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal` renders generic fallback
- **NOT in `api/sitemap.js`** — zero sitemap entries
- **NO SSR meta handler** in `api/meta/[...path].js` — generic fallback title

The data is built. The pages just need wiring.

## Fix

### 1. `packages/frontend/App.js`

Import GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES and add to the `/guides/<slug>` routing block:
```js
import { GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES } from './data/genreGearGuides';
// In the guides path handler, check if slug matches a GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES entry
```

### 2. `api/sitemap.js`

```js
import { GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES } from '../packages/frontend/data/genreGearGuides';
// Add to sitemap:
...Object.values(GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES).map(g => ({ loc: `/guides/${g.slug}`, priority: '0.95', changefreq: 'monthly' })),
```

### 3. `api/meta/[...path].js`

Add cases for genre-guide slugs, emit: keyword-matched title, HowTo or Article JSON-LD + FAQPage.

## Expected impact

- "best drum pedals for death metal" = high-intent purchase query (~1,200 monthly searches estimated)
- "best snare drums for thrash metal" = converts gear research to affiliate traffic
- Both match MetalForge's authority on metal drummer gear

## Quality gate

- Routes live at `/guides/best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal` and `/guides/best-snare-drums-for-thrash-metal`
- Both appear in sitemap.xml
- SSR title: "Best Drum Pedals for Death Metal 2026 | MetalForge Expert Guide"
- HowTo or Article JSON-LD in SSR

## Verify

1. `curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep 'best-drum-pedals'` — appears in sitemap
2. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/guides/best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal | jq '.title'` — keyword-matched
3. Visit https://metalforge.io/guides/best-drum-pedals-for-death-metal — renders guide content (not fallback)

## Done

- [ ] App.js imports and routes GENRE_GEAR_GUIDES
- [ ] sitemap.js includes 2 new /guides/<slug> entries
- [ ] api/meta handles genre-guide slugs with proper title + schema
title: SEO batch: Genre gear guide pages — wire up App.js routes + sitemap + SSR meta (~2 pages, data already built)
